TypeUpdateLink
🆕 New scheme announcedOdisha State Scholarship Portal © 2026, All Rights Reserved—
⚙️ Rule / stipend changeCheck Scholarship EligibilityOpen ➜
⚙️ Rule / stipend changeCheck EligibilityOpen ➜
⚙️ Rule / stipend changeClick on the Check Eligibility—
⚙️ Rule / stipend changeProvide all necessary details I.e. Student, Academic, Eligibility & Bank information.—
⚙️ Rule / stipend changeInterested eligible ST & SC students can apply for freeship card in Odisha State Scholarship Portal (OSSP) by providing basic eligibility documents i.e. income certificate and caste certificate and basic profile details.—

Source page: https://scholarship.odisha.gov.in/
